# Apple Stock Summary

Apple (AAPL) is currently trading at $185.50 per share, up 2.3% today on a volume of 45 million shares, with a market capitalization of $2.87 trillion and a price-to-earnings ratio of 28.4. The stock has traded between a 52-week low of $155 and a high of $198, and offers shareholders a dividend yield of 0.55%.
